series_metadata.series_description: This file includes any forms or records pertaining to vehicle accidents in which Transportation employees are involved. A case history on each accident includes the following: PS-6 Form - Employee's statement; Law enforcement agency report; PS-34 - Safety Investigator's Report; Teletype message - sent by district to initially report accident; PS-9 - Cover sheet for case history with pertinent information. Distribution: PS-6 - Original to Safety and Claims, Copy retained in District Safety Office; Law Enforcement Agency Report - Original retained at source, 1st copy retained in Safety and Claims, 2nd copy retained in District Safety Office, Teletype - Original attached to case history, copy retained in active area; PS-9 - Original to District Safety Office for Transportation Boards of Review, Copy retained in Safety and Claims.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Active files will be microfilmed continually. File records prior January, 1973 will not be microfilmed. These files will be subject present retention schedule. Paper copy of active file be destroyed microfilming has been checked quality and completeness and retrievability. ; Microform: Microfilm is retained in active area reviewed by ODOT Review Boards. in active area
